description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Create a new watchlist named 'Critical Watch' that contains only the single service with the lowest uptime over the last 7 days.
tasks.name: Create a new watchlist named 'Critical Watch' that contains only the single service with the lowest uptime over the last 7 days.
tasks.description: Create a new watchlist named 'Critical Watch' that contains only the single service with the lowest uptime over the last 7 days.

tasks.instruction: For the service that has regional performance data for yesterday, set as preferred the region with the lowest average response time for that day.
tasks.name: For the service that has regional performance data for yesterday, set as preferred the region with the lowest average response time for that day.
tasks.description: For the service that has regional performance data for yesterday, set as preferred the region with the lowest average response time for that day.

tasks.instruction: Compare the two services that have 90-day uptime statistics in the security/authentication and payments categories, and add the tag 'More Reliable' to whichever has fewer total minutes of downtime.
tasks.name: Compare the two services that have 90-day uptime statistics in the security/authentication and payments categories, and add the tag 'More Reliable' to whichever has fewer total minutes of downtime.
tasks.description: Compare the two services that have 90-day uptime statistics in the security/authentication and payments categories, and add the tag 'More Reliable' to whichever has fewer total minutes of downtime.

tasks.instruction: Schedule a maintenance window for the primary relational database service on the 15th of the current month starting at 02:00, lasting 1 hour 30 minutes, with the title 'Index maintenance' and impact level 'Degraded performance'.
tasks.name: Schedule a maintenance window for the primary relational database service on the 15th of the current month starting at 02:00, lasting 1 hour 30 minutes, with the title 'Index maintenance' and impact level 'Degraded performance'.
tasks.description: Schedule a maintenance window for the primary relational database service on the 15th of the current month starting at 02:00, lasting 1 hour 30 minutes, with the title 'Index maintenance' and impact level 'Degraded performance'.

tasks.instruction: Create a critical alert rule on the payments service that has a last-24-hours uptime metric so it triggers when uptime falls below 99.5% and notifies via in-app banner.
tasks.name: Create a critical alert rule on the payments service that has a last-24-hours uptime metric so it triggers when uptime falls below 99.5% and notifies via in-app banner.
tasks.description: Create a critical alert rule on the payments service that has a last-24-hours uptime metric so it triggers when uptime falls below 99.5% and notifies via in-app banner.

tasks.instruction: Save an incident report for the last 30 days filtered to only major and critical severities, using the name 'Last 30 days - High impact'.

expected_values.name: Last 30 days - High impact
expected_values.description: Major and critical incidents from the last 30 days across all services.

tasks.name: Save an incident report for the last 30 days filtered to only major and critical severities, using the name 'Last 30 days - High impact'.

tasks.instruction: In the status overview, filter to services in the payments category with uptime below 99.95%, sort by lowest uptime first, and pin the first two services in that list.
tasks.name: In the status overview, filter to services in the payments category with uptime below 99.95%, sort by lowest uptime first, and pin the first two services in that list.

tasks.instruction: Add a 'Weekly uptime summary' widget to the main dashboard that appears at the top and includes four key services—one for real-time payment processing, one for user authentication, one for the primary database cluster, and one for email delivery—then reorder them inside the widget so they appear in that order.
